basic_details.job_title: SAGES Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 57 Teacher, Computer Teacher and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Education Officer & Secretary, Swami Atmanand Utkrisht Vidyalaya Prabandhan Samiti, Balodabazar-Bhatapara (C.G.)
basic_details.post_name: Lecturer, Teacher, PT Teacher, Computer Teacher, Assistant Teacher, Lab Assistant Teacher, Librarian, Head Teacher (Primary)
basic_details.short_information: District Education Officer & Secretary, Swami Atmanand Utkrisht Vidyalaya Prabandhan Samiti, Balodabazar-Bhatapara (C.G.) (SEJES) Teaching and Non-Teaching Notification 2026 has been released on 27-05-2026 on the official website https://balodabazar.gov.in. A total of 57 vacancies have been announced through the SEJES Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026.

important_dates.document verification: To be notified after merit list
important_dates.appointment: Subject to document verification and medical fitness

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the notification. Applications are to be submitted via Google Form free of charge.

age_limit.details: Candidates must have completed a minimum of 21 years of age and must not have crossed 35 years of age as on 01/01/2026.

qualification.details: All educational qualifications must be completed by the application date. Only Indian citizens who are domiciled in Chhattisgarh are eligible. Candidates must not currently be serving as a contractual employee in SEJES at an equivalent post (they may apply for higher posts only).
qualification.domicile: Indian Citizen; must be a native resident of Chhattisgarh (domicile certificate from competent authority required)
qualification.education_qualification: As per post (see post-wise details below)

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 25,300/- to Rs. 38,100/- per month (lump sum, no other allowances)

selection_process: Selection will be purely merit-based on academic qualification marks. There is no written examination or oral interview.
Marks weightage for selection will be calculated as follows:
Top 10 candidates per vacancy will be called for document verification based on the merit list. Selection will be finalised only after verification of all original documents and certificates.
Selected candidates must submit a government medical board fitness certificate within 7 days of joining.
Note: No written exam or oral test is conducted. Merit list is the sole basis for shortlisting.
A wait list (valid for 1 year from date of result or next recruitment exercise
whichever is earlier) will be maintained for each post category. Candidates on the wait list may be considered if originally selected candidates do not join.
Contractual appointment will be for 1 year initially

renewable based on performance review by the Principal and School Management Committee. Either party may terminate the contract with 3 months' prior notice or 3 months' salary in lieu thereof. The School Management Committee may terminate without prior notice upon completion of the contract period. Contractual employees will NOT be entitled to pension

or any other benefit available to regular government employees. No claim for regularisation or permanent employment will be entertained. Salary will be a fixed monthly lump sum only; no annual increment
or other allowances. The appointment is purely temporary; there is no claim to equivalent government service posts.
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only via the Google Form link. No offline/postal applications will be accepted.
Google Form Link: https://forms.gle/YrPT9FToRFFKYi1a7 Application Window: 28/05/2026 to 15/06/2026 (12:00 noon sharp) Official Website for Notification: https://balodabazar.gov.in/
important_instructions: Only one application per candidate. In case of multiple applications, the first application will be considered valid. Applications received after the deadline will not be considered under any circumstances. Candidates must appear at document verification with all original certificates and self-attested copies. Caste certificate (SC/ST/OBC) must be issued by competent authority in prescribed Government of India format. Domicile/nativity certificate of Chhattisgarh is mandatory. Medical fitness certificate from government medical board must be submitted within 7 days of joining.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SEJES Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for SEJES Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 is 15 June 2026 till 12:00 Noon. Candidates must complete the Google Form application before the deadline. Late applications will not be accepted under any circumstances.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in SEJES Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 57 teaching and non-teaching vacancies have been announced under Swami Atmanand Excellent Schools in Balodabazar-Bhatapara district. Posts include Lecturer, Teacher, Assistant Teacher, Computer Teacher, PT Teacher, and Head Teacher. Vacancies are distributed across 16 schools.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for SEJES Teaching Recruitment 2026 posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a fixed monthly salary ranging from Rs. 25,300 to Rs. 38,100 depending on the post. The salary is provided as a lump-sum contractual payment. No DA, HRA, or additional government allowances will be provided.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for SEJES Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants must be between 21 and 35 years of age as on 01 January 2026. Reserved category candidates will receive age relaxation as per Chhattisgarh Government rules. Women and CG domicile candidates are also eligible for additional relaxation.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for SEJES vacancies?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess qualifications such as Higher Secondary, Graduation, Post Graduation, B.Ed., D.El.Ed., B.P.Ed., or Computer Science/IT qualifications based on the post applied for. Relevant CG TET qualification is also mandatory for several posts. English medium education is compulsory for most teaching positions.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for SEJES Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification. Eligible candidates can apply online completely free of cost through the Google Form link. Applicants should carefully fill out the form with correct details.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for SEJES Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process is completely merit-based and no written examination or interview will be conducted. Merit lists will be prepared based on academic qualification marks. Shortlisted candidates will then be called for document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is CG TET mandatory for SEJES Teaching posts?
faq.answer: Yes, CG TET qualification is mandatory for several posts including Teacher, Assistant Teacher, and Head Teacher positions. Primary level TET is required for Assistant Teacher posts, while Pre-Secondary level TET is needed for Teacher posts. Lecturer posts do not require TET qualification.

faq.question: Q9. How can candidates apply for SEJES Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online only through the official Google Form link provided in the notification. Offline applications or postal submissions will not be accepted. Applicants should also keep scanned copies of required documents ready before applying.

faq.question: Q10. Where can candidates download the SEJES Recruitment 2026 notification PDF?
faq.answer: Candidates can download the official SEJES Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 notification PDF from the official website of Balodabazar District Administration. The notification contains complete eligibility, vacancy, salary, and application details. Applicants are advised to read the full notification carefully before applying.
